package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for package_name_role_drift: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Packages whose names advertise one role, such as `service` or `model`, but whose exported symbols primarily belong to another role.
type CasePackageNameRoleDriftDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePackageNameRoleDriftModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePackageNameRoleDriftRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePackageNameRoleDriftModel
}

type CasePackageNameRoleDriftService struct {
    repo *CasePackageNameRoleDriftRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePackageNameRoleDriftAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativePackageNameRoleDrift(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePackageNameRoleDriftDTO) error {
    focus := "package_name_role_drift"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CasePackageNameRoleDriftDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CasePackageNameRoleDriftModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    package_name_role_drift_negative := map[string]int{"package": 1, "name": 2, "role": 3, "drift": 4}
    package_name_role_drift_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    package_negative_0 := package_name_role_drift_negative["package"] + len(input)
    _ = package_negative_0
    name_negative_1 := package_name_role_drift_negative["name"] + len(input)
    _ = name_negative_1
    role_negative_2 := package_name_role_drift_negative["role"] + len(input)
    _ = role_negative_2
    drift_negative_3 := package_name_role_drift_negative["drift"] + len(input)
    _ = drift_negative_3
    return nil
}
